defaults.aboutTourDescription: Join one of our guided walking experiences and discover Copenhagen with local insights, iconic landmarks and practical recommendations for the rest of your stay.
highlights: Led by experienced local guides who bring each stop to life with stories and context.
Balanced route mixing top landmarks with less crowded local spots.
Great for first-time visitors and returning travelers looking for deeper context.
Small-group format designed for interaction and flexibility.
defaults.itineraryDescription: Gather at the meeting point, get a quick overview of the route, then explore key streets, squares and monuments while learning about Copenhagen's history, architecture and local culture. Finish with practical city tips, food suggestions and recommendations for what to visit next.
included: Guided walking experience with an experienced local guide
Storytelling and historical context at every major stop
Curated local recommendations for the rest of your stay
defaults.customerSupportDescription: We have a professional customer support team and always accompany you on every trip.

whyChoose.heading: Why Travelers Choose Walk & Tour
whyChoose.description: At Walk and Tour, we believe the best way to truly experience Copenhagen is on foot and at a local pace.

termsOfUsePage.intro: Please review these terms and conditions before using the Website or booking any experience with Walk and Tour ApS.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
paragraphs: Welcome to the Walk and Tour ApS website (the "Website"). By accessing or using this Website, you agree to comply with these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please refrain from using the Website.

useOfWebsite.title: 2. Use of Website
paragraphs: You may use this Website for personal and non-commercial purposes, such as browsing travel packages, making reservations, and accessing information.
Unauthorized use, including but not limited to data mining, reproduction, or modification, is strictly prohibited.

bookingAndPayments.title: 3. Booking and Payments
paragraphs: Participation in tours promoted by Walk and Tour ApS is strictly voluntary. By making a reservation, the participant automatically accepts the terms and conditions specified in this document.

freeTours.title: 3.1 Free Tours
paragraphs: We always recommend booking your place on the free tour through our website. Priority is given to those who have made a reservation.
Those without a reserved place are subject to availability on a first-come, first-served basis.

groups.title: 3.2 Groups
paragraphs: The free tour is designed for small groups. Groups of 6 or more adults are asked for a contribution of 10 euros per person at the beginning of the tour to guarantee the guide a fair income for their work.
This also applies to multiple bookings made by the same family or group of friends. The guide may cancel the booking on site if groups do not comply with this group policy.
For groups of more than 10 adults, please contact us directly to hire a private tour. This is the only way to guarantee that the group takes the tour together with an exclusive guide.

modificationOfDate.title: 3.3 Modification of Date
paragraphs: If you want to change the date and/or time of a paid or private tour, please send an email to info@walkandtour.dk with the name, a photo of the ticket, and the new date requested for the tour.
Any changes to your reservation must be requested at least 72 hours before the departure time of the tour. We will be happy to help whenever possible.

delays.title: 3.4 Delays
paragraphs: For free tours and paid tours, the guide starts the activity at the agreed time. For organizational reasons, it is not possible to join the tour halfway through.
If participants do not arrive on time at the agreed starting point, Walk and Tour ApS reserves the right to start the tour, excursion, or trip without them.

For private tours, the guide is reserved only for the time period indicated in the reservation description. If the group arrives more than 15 minutes late, the waiting time will be deducted from the agreed tour duration.
The guide has a tolerance of 15 minutes. If the group does not establish contact, it will be considered a no-show and the service will be canceled without the possibility of a refund.
In case of delay, you can contact us from Monday to Sunday at +45 71352453 between 10:00 and 16:00 or write to info@walkandtour.dk.

considerations.title: 3.5 Considerations
paragraphs: Participants should keep in mind that the tours are on foot and may require physical effort at times. Therefore, they are not recommended for people with certain health conditions.
We recommend that participants wear appropriate clothing and footwear for the activity, as well as bring water, an umbrella, or rain gear. The weather in Copenhagen can be quite irregular.

cancellationsAndRefunds.title: 4. Cancellations and Refunds
paragraphs: You can cancel your private tour or paid tour reservation by sending an email to info@walkandtour.dk. Cancellations must be made at least 72 hours before the start of the activity.
After this period, the company reserves the right not to issue a refund.
Walk and Tour reserves the right to charge cancellation fees.

intellectualProperty.title: 5. Intellectual Property
paragraphs: All content on this Website, including text, images, logos, and trademarks, is the property of Walk and Tour or its licensors. Unauthorized use, reproduction, or distribution is prohibited.
Tour descriptions are informative and general. Walk and Tour ApS and the guide reserve the right to modify the route whenever deemed necessary for safety reasons or weather conditions.
Activities do not include entrance to attractions such as castles or museums unless specifically stated.

limitationOfLiability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: Walk and Tour is not liable for any direct or indirect damages arising from the use of this Website or its services, including cancellations due to unforeseen circumstances, delays, or third-party actions.
The tour price does not include any type of insurance for participants. We recommend taking out travel insurance that covers personal accidents, personal belongings, or liability.
Neither Walk and Tour ApS nor the guides who conduct the tours are responsible for any physical injury, damage, or loss of personal property during the tours.
The guides reserve the right to deny the participation of any person, for any reason, in any of the tours.

privacyPolicy.title: 7. Privacy Policy
paragraphs: Your use of this Website is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

externalLinks.title: 8. External Links
paragraphs: The Website may contain links to third-party sites. Walk and Tour is not responsible for the content or policies of these external websites.

changesToTerms.title: 9. Changes to Terms
paragraphs: Walk and Tour reserves the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Continued use of the Website after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

contactInformation.title: 10. Contact Information
paragraphs: For any questions regarding these Terms, please contact us:

privacyPolicyPage.intro: Read how Walk and Tour ApS collects, uses, stores, and protects personal information when you visit our Website or book our services.

blocks.text: Walk and Tour ApS ("Walk and Tour," "we," "our," or "us") values your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our website ("Website") and services.
We may collect the following types of personal information when you use our Website or services:

items.label: Personal Details
items.text: Name, email address, phone number, and payment details when making a booking.

items.label: Booking Information
items.text: Travel dates, destinations, accommodation preferences, and other relevant details.

items.label: Technical Data
items.text: IP address, browser type, operating system, and browsing behavior on our Website.

items.label: Communication Data
items.text: Messages, inquiries, and feedback submitted through our Website or customer service.

blocks.text: We use your information for the following purposes:

items.text: To process and confirm your bookings.
To communicate with you regarding your travel plans and provide customer support.
To personalize your experience and improve our Website and services.
To send promotional emails or offers (you may opt out at any time).
To comply with legal obligations and prevent fraud.

blocks.text: We do not sell or rent your personal data. However, we may share it with:

items.label: Service Providers
items.text: Hotels, tour guides, tour operators, and transport providers to fulfill your bookings.

items.label: Payment Processors
items.text: Secure third-party services to process transactions.

items.label: Legal Authorities
items.text: When required by law or to protect our rights and users.

blocks.text: We take appropriate security measures to protect your personal data from unauthorized access, loss, or misuse. However, no system is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
Our Website may use cookies and similar technologies to improve performance and understand how visitors use our pages.
We only activate Google Tag Manager and Google Analytics after you give consent through our analytics banner. If you decline, analytics tracking remains disabled.

items.label: Analytics Providers
items.text: Google Tag Manager and Google Analytics may process information such as pages visited, approximate location, device and browser details, and interactions on the Website.

items.label: Cookie Control
items.text: You can accept or decline analytics cookies from our banner, and you can clear your stored preference through your browser settings at any time.
Access, update, or delete your personal information.
Request a copy of your stored data.

blocks.text: To exercise these rights, contact us using the details listed below.
Our Website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for their privacy policies or practices.
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page, and continued use of our Website means you accept the updates.
For any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:

workWithUsPage.title: Your City. Your Stories. Our Team.
workWithUsPage.paragraph1: Would you like to be part of leading the next tours in Copenhagen? We're looking for passionate, exceptional guides ready to handpick and bring to life the city's most captivating stories, all while building genuine relationships with travelers from around the world.
workWithUsPage.paragraph2: This role isn't about reciting facts; it's about being a cultural host and the face of the city. If you have a true connection to Copenhagen, thrive on the freedom to personalize your narrative, and are eager to join a growing, entrepreneurial agency, then you belong here. Come and help us build the tours that set the standard for quality and connection in Denmark.
workWithUsPage.imageAlt: Work with us at Walk and Tour

intro.title: Curated and authentic experiences
intro.description: Walk and Tour Copenhagen has a steadfast commitment to excellence and delivering "true experiences." We offer expertly designed tours, flexible travel packages, and personalized itineraries that cater to every traveler's needs. Our team of passionate, experienced guides ensures seamless journeys, from breathtaking sightseeing excursions to immersive cultural explorations. Whether you are seeking to discover Copenhagen's iconic landmarks, embark on an adventure to Malmö, or explore Denmark's majestic castles, Walk and Tour Copenhagen provides exceptional service, competitive pricing, and unforgettable travel memories.
intro.imageAlt: Hotel D'Angleterre with Walk and Tour guests

personalizedExperiences.description: With years of industry experience, we provide seamless and memorable tours with expert guidance and a stress-free experience for every guest.
